sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Fester collects different weapons from Addams Family members throughout the game. Projectile behavior differs between regions: North American version has bullets that collide with walls/objects (making aiming harder), while European version allows projectiles to pass through walls/obstacles.

special_mechanics.name: Noose Item
special_mechanics.description: Special item that summons Lurch to destroy all enemies currently on screen when used.

special_mechanics.name: Overhead to 3D Perspective Shift
special_mechanics.description: Game transitions from overhead view in streets/sewers to 3D dungeon-crawl perspective when entering buildings (6 buildings with first being optional).

tier_notes: Tier 2: No precise physics parameters documented. Sources provide game design overview, regional differences affecting projectile behavior, and level structure, but contain no quantitative movement, gravity, jump, or sub-pixel system data. Regional difficulty difference is qualitative (reduced enemy/boss health in EU version).
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Fester's Quest article
